overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade. The player travels under a massive curved LED bridge, crosses a busy intersection with an elevated metro train passing overhead, and continues past neon signs and towering skyscrapers in a vibrant cyberpunk city.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade under colorful LED bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beneath the curved LED bridge

entered.detail: massive curved structure with rainbow-colored LED panels spanning overhead
calm waterway running parallel to the walkway with concrete embankment
wide pedestrian walkway with yellow tactile paving strips
tall futuristic building with reflective glass facade
tropical palm tree planted along the promenade edge
tall cylindrical industrial tower with 06 marking visible in distance
large digital screen displaying advertisement with muscular figure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a narrow waterfront promenade. A massive curved LED bridge with rainbow-colored panels spans overhead, casting colorful light. To the right is a calm canal, while futuristic glass buildings line the left. The walkway is relatively quiet with sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with elevated metro infrastructure

events.description: exits narrow waterfront promenade into open urban intersection
camera tilts upward to view the curved LED bridge structure overhead

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the intersection, looking up at the architecture while navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street adjacent to the promenade

entered.detail: heavy green steel support columns for the elevated train track
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing on the orange-tinted asphalt
elevated railway structure with yellow and black striped safety barriers
small structure with signage indicating metro station entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide urban intersection as the camera leaves the narrow promenade. The camera tilts up to admire the curved LED bridge overhead before focusing on the elevated metro tracks ahead. Pedestrians cross in various directions and a futuristic car drives past on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with elevated train track and digital billboards

events.description: elevated metro train passes overhead traveling from left to right
crossing the street at the pedestrian crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: navigating across the open plaza while watching the metro train pass overhead

notable_agents.action: metro train traveling on elevated track from left to right

entered.detail: futuristic train with teal and yellow coloring moving on elevated track
tall structure supporting multiple digital advertisement screens
open pedestrian area with distinctive orange and yellow paving stones
large vertical sign with EL GUAPO text and stylized face graphic

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the open plaza as a metro train passes overhead on the elevated track. The ground transitions to orange paving stones. Digital billboards tower on the right side, and the El Guapo sign becomes visible. The canal returns to view on the right as the camera approaches the far side of the intersection.

events.description: passes under the highway overpass structure with El Guapo signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path under the shadow of the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway overpass with directional signage
dark industrial building with closed shutters and minimal windows
green directional signs with white text indicating Santo Domingo and other destinations
large bridge visible in the far distance spanning the waterway
yellow and black striped construction barriers lining the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the massive highway overpass structure, entering a more sheltered environment. The El Guapo sign dominates the view overhead. The path continues alongside the canal with industrial buildings on the right and construction barriers on the left. The lighting becomes darker under the overpass shadow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a colorful waterfront promenade into the shadowed depths of a massive urban overpass. It begins by walking beneath a curved LED bridge that casts rainbow hues over a quiet canal and sleek glass buildings. As the camera leaves the narrow walkway, the environment opens into a wide, bustling intersection where the view tilts upward toward the bridge before focusing on elevated metro tracks and passing futuristic traffic. The scene then shifts across orange paving stones as a metro train roars overhead and towering digital billboards, including the El Guapo sign, emerge alongside the returning canal. Finally, the camera glides under the heavy concrete of a highway overpass, where the vibrant city light fades into deep shadow amidst industrial buildings and construction barriers.
